content: Takumi Matsunobu, a postdoctral student at Univerisity of Tsukuba, is seeking how weather shifts and how we predict it well. Potential predictability of severe weather using a numerical weather prediction system is my principal research topic, i.e., I am researching what ratio of variance in the weather can be described by computer simulations.

title: Takumi Matsunobu
